description_long: This object consists of a robust, angled metal rack designed to hold a set of hexagonal dumbbells, which are arranged in three horizontal tiers. The rack is constructed from thick, gray metal beams with reinforced joints and wide, stable feet for support. The dumbbells themselves have black, hexagonal heads and short, straight handles, each with visible weight markings on the end caps. The hexagonal shape of the dumbbells prevents them from rolling, making them suitable for both storage and use on flat surfaces. The overall design is utilitarian and durable, suitable for public gyms, parks, or urban fitness areas. The set appears clean, well-maintained, and free from visible damage or rust.
description: A sturdy, gray metal rack holds a set of black hexagonal dumbbells with visible weight markings. The rack and dumbbells are clean, durable, and designed for urban fitness environments.
description_view_0: Front view of the rack showing three tiers and the dumbbells neatly stored in place.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled structure of the rack and the full row of dumbbells placed beside it.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rack's frame and all dumbbells lined up in front, clearly showing their hexagonal ends and weight markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rack's angled profile and the dumbbells aligned on the ground.
attribute_handle_type: Short, straight, round cross-section handles with a likely knurled or textured grip for secure handling.
attribute_end_cap_design: Hexagonal, flat end caps made of black rubber or coated metal, with visible weight markings printed or embossed on the surface.
attribute_presence_of_weight_markings: Weight markings are visible on the end caps, printed in white text indicating the weight value.
attribute_condition: The dumbbells and rack appear new and unused, with no visible signs of wear, rust, or damage.
